articles.title_zh: 锌矿需要无人能造的卡车，于是他们自己造了一辆

Zijin Mining couldn’t find an ultra-class electric haul truck that could get the job done at its Wulagen mine in Wuqia County, Xinjiang, so they designed their own: a 140-ton BEV haul truck with a huge, 770 kWh swappable battery pack.

articles.title_original: From labs to logistics: China tests sodium batteries in HD trucks
articles.title_zh: 从实验室到物流：中国在重型卡车上测试钠电池
articles.summary: Made from more affordable and more abundant materials than li-ion, sodium batteries promise more abundant and more affordable electric vehicles – but will sodium batteries be practical for commercial trucks? Chinese truck brand FAW Jiefang is working to find out.

articles.title_original: The wait is over: Royal Enfield’s first electric motorcycle begins deliveries
articles.title_zh: 等待结束：皇家恩菲尔德首款电动摩托车开始交付
articles.summary: Royal Enfield’s long-awaited entry into the electric motorcycle market has officially begun. The company’s dedicated EV sub-brand, Flying Flea, has started customer deliveries of its first electric motorcycle, the FF.C6, with initial handovers taking place in Bengaluru, India.

articles.summary:
A driver told Harris County investigators that his Tesla was on Autopilot before it left a residential road in Katy, Texas, crashed through the brick wall of a home, and killed a 76-year-old woman inside.

articles.title_original: BYD’s luxury SUV received a record 150,000 orders, and now it’s headed overseas
articles.title_zh: 比亚迪豪华SUV获15万订单创纪录，即将出海
articles.summary: The Great Tang is the largest, most luxurious SUV to launch under the BYD brand. After a hot start in China, racking up a record 150,000 orders ahead of launch, BYD is bringing the flagship electric SUV overseas, including Europe, by the end of 2026.

articles.title_original: BMW can’t wait: i3 orders open months early as buyers rush in
articles.title_zh: 宝马i3订单提前数月开放，买家蜂拥而至
articles.summary: The new i3 is arriving sooner than expected. Although it wasn’t expected to go on sale until this fall, BMW has already opened orders in several markets after “high levels” of early interest.

articles.summary: Jeep’s first real off-road EV is finally here. The 2026 Jeep Recon EV is now on sale, starting at $67,000, but its driving range comes up a bit short of expectations.

articles.title_original: Maserati boosts Folgore EV range by up to 85 km in 2026 refresh
articles.title_zh: 玛莎拉蒂2026年改款Folgore EV续航提升85公里
articles.summary:
Maserati revealed updates to its Folgore electric lineup, with the GranTurismo Folgore now claiming over 540 km (335 miles) of WLTP range — an improvement of roughly 85 km over the previous version thanks to new energy management algorithms.

articles.title_original: Colombia announces 750 mile electric truck corridor linking Bogotá to Cartagena
articles.title_zh: 哥伦比亚宣布建设750英里电动卡车走廊，连接波哥大与卡塔赫纳
articles.summary: In a major win for Latin American air quality, the new 750 mile Ruta-E electric truck corridor will connect Bogotá and Cartagena with charging infrastructure built to support the more than 1,000 commercial EVs set to hit Colombia’s roads by 2032.
